calendar.matters:
Petition To Compel Trustee To Account, Distribute Assets Per Trust Terms, Redress Breaches Of Fiduciary Duty And Order Removing Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account, Distribute Assets Per Trust Terms, Redress Breaches Of Fiduciary Duty And Order Removing Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Continued To Nov-09-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phil Foster for (petitioner) Karen Gon and specially appearing for Catherine Lee for the respondents.

The Court stated that the parties seem to be working on the same path and asked where they stand. Mr. Foster reported that the 2014 tax return has been filed, that the 2015 tax return will be filed this week, that they have been provided with an accounting from the date of death to present, that the trustee has identified the assets to the beneficiaries, that bank statements have been provided, that there were allegations of co-mingling but it appears that the problem has been corrected and that they have been able to this on the bank statements, that a preliminary distribution was made 3 weeks ago, that it is a small trust of $537,000.00, that there is $112,000.00 remaining, that tax returns will need to be filed for 2016 and after that final distribution will be made, that they feel they are getting cooperation, that there is no reason to suspect dissipation of assets or shenanigans and that they would like a continuance to January 2017. The Court stated that it seems that everything has been complied with why not take it off calendar. Mr. Foster responded that the issue of attorney's fees is not currently resolved. The Court stated that it does not want this hanging out there for a year and requested an amended petition letting the Court know what is still pending. Mr. Foster asked that it be continued for 60 days and that at that time he will either file an amended petition or take the matter off calendar. The Petition to Compel Trustee to Account, etc., was continued to November 9, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
